method: Continuation from clean handoff: verify migration reconciliation once, then migrate the remaining known runtime SQLite customer/telemetry stores to composed production Postgres adapters while preserving local/test SQLite adapters.

proof.migrationFreshPath: pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy + prisma migrate status passed against local Postgres aol_dev
proof.representativeLegacyPath: legacy-style existing DB with preserved operatorPilotIntake row reconciled by marking baseline and pilot migration applied; migrate deploy/status clean; row preserved
proof.focusedTests: pnpm exec vitest run tests/runtime-hardening/demo-runtime-prisma-stores.test.ts tests/runtime-hardening/serverless-route-store-boundaries.test.ts tests/demo-journey/signal-consent-transition.test.ts tests/demo-journey/corridor-recommendation-context.test.ts tests/demo-journey/funnel-event-store.test.ts tests/demo-journey/sqlite-runtime-guard.test.ts --reporter=dot => 6 files / 23 tests passed

stores.currentAdapter: Composed store: production Prisma/Postgres; local/test better-sqlite3
stores.transactional: Prisma/Postgres; transition history and optimistic concurrency already implemented in prior handoff
stores.tenantIsolated: customer reference plus stored contact/intake context; operator route admin-gated
stores.localTestAuthority: better-sqlite3 adapter retained for deterministic local tests

stores.currentAdapter: Composed store: production Prisma/Postgres; local/test better-sqlite3
stores.transactional: Prisma/Postgres row transitions; token identity/tenant checks enforced by adapter
stores.tenantIsolated: tenantId and subjectId enforced on all post-identity transitions
stores.localTestAuthority: better-sqlite3 adapter retained for deterministic tests

stores.capability: Corridor recommendation context (Signal to Corridor continuity)
stores.currentAdapter: Composed store: production Prisma/Postgres; local/test better-sqlite3
stores.tenantIsolated: session/recommendation scoped; no confidential decision text stored
stores.localTestAuthority: better-sqlite3 adapter retained for deterministic tests

stores.currentAdapter: Composed store: production Prisma/Postgres; local/test better-sqlite3
stores.transactional: Prisma/Postgres append-only event rows and groupBy summary
stores.tenantIsolated: structured metadata only; no arbitrary payload/decision text column
stores.localTestAuthority: better-sqlite3 adapter retained for deterministic tests

stores.capability: Interaction spine durable store (compounding twin) — env-gated
stores.currentAdapter: better-sqlite3 only when explicit non-production store path is configured; otherwise no-op binding
stores.serverlessSafe: safe-by-default: no silent production filesystem write
stores.productionAuthority: not activated by this runtime path unless a production Postgres adapter is configured in a future dedicated lane

stores.capability: Decision graph / watchdog / analytics / recommendation durable stores
stores.serverlessSafe: n/a: no production API/page caller in current route-store map

remainingAdjacentRisks: Funnel endpoint still uses per-process simple-rate-limit; replace with distributed Postgres/Redis limiter before final production PASS.
Pilot customer status still supports ref query lookup; secure POST-secret to HttpOnly session flow remains open.
Assessment accessibility/responsive convergence remains open in later programme sections.
Price presentation hardcoded-currency audit remains open in later programme sections.
